nasb.text: You also gave them kingdoms and peoples, And allotted them to them as a boundary. They took possession of the land of Sihon the king of Heshbon And the land of Og the king of Bashan.

esv.text: “And you gave them kingdoms and peoples and allotted to them every corner. So they took possession of the land of Sihon king of Heshbon and the land of Og king of Bashan.

cnv.text: 你把列國和萬民賜給他們， 你把列國分給他們作疆界， 他們就獲得西宏之地，希實本王之地和巴珊王噩之地。

ccb.text: “你将列国和万民赐给他们，为他们划分疆界，他们占领了希实本王西宏和巴珊王噩的土地。
